channel.title: End2End Diffusion Blog
channel.description: Research notes, hypotheses, and findings on end-to-end diffusion training and visual representation learning.

item.title: On the Geometry of Latent Token Spaces in End-to-End VAEs
item.description: Investigating how pseudo-token embeddings organize spatial structure during joint encoder-decoder training.
item.dc:creator: Jaskirat Singh

item.title: Compute-Optimal Scaling for End-to-End Diffusion: A Hypothesis
item.description: Early observations suggest a distinct scaling regime when the VAE and DiT are co-trained. Are Chinchilla-style laws applicable here?
item.dc:creator: Jaskirat Singh

item.title: Spatial Structure Is All You Need for Alignment
item.description: Our large-scale empirical analysis confirms spatial structure, not global information, drives generation performance when aligning external representations.
item.dc:creator: Jaskirat Singh

item.title: Why We Started This Blog
item.description: A short note on making research thinking visible — the motivations behind maintaining a public research log.
item.dc:creator: Jaskirat Singh
